description.content: Create, retrieve, update, and manage invoices. Invoices represent billing documents from suppliers for goods or services delivered.
Retrieve a list of invoices. Use query parameters to filter results. Supports filtering by status, supplier, date ranges, and export status.

query.description: Number of records to skip for pagination
Maximum number of records to return (max 50)
Set to limited to return only key fields, or shallow to exclude nested objects
Sort direction (asc or desc)

Filter by invoice status. Full list includes new, draft, pending_approval, approved, pending_receipt, processing, payable_adjustment, on_hold, ap_hold, booking_hold, pending_action, rejected, disputed, abandoned, voided, invalid.
Filter by invoice number
Filter by supplier name
Filter for records updated after this datetime
Filter by export status

Create, retrieve, update, and manage purchase orders. Purchase orders represent commitments to buy goods or services from suppliers.
Retrieve a list of purchase orders. Use query parameters to filter results. Coupa recommends always limiting result sets with GET criteria for optimal performance.

query.description: Number of records to skip for pagination
Maximum number of records to return (max 50)
Set to limited to return only key fields, or shallow to exclude nested objects
Sort direction (asc or desc)
Filter by order status. Includes buyer_hold, cancelled, closed, currency_hold, draft, error, expensed, issued, supplier_hold, supplier_window_hold, and exported.
Filter by purchase order number
Filter by supplier name
Filter for records updated after this datetime
Filter for records created after this datetime
Filter by export status

Create, retrieve, update, and manage requisitions. Requisitions are internal requests to purchase goods or services that go through approval workflows before becoming purchase orders.
Retrieve a list of requisitions. Use query parameters to filter results. Supports filtering by status, requester, date ranges, and export status.

query.description: Number of records to skip for pagination
Maximum number of records to return (max 50)
Set to limited to return only key fields, or shallow to exclude nested objects
Sort direction (asc or desc)
Filter by requisition status (draft, cart, pending_buyer_action, pending_approval, approved, ordered, partially_received, received, abandoned, withdrawn)
Filter by requester login
Filter for records updated after this datetime
Filter by export status

Your Coupa instance subdomain

oauth2.value: core.purchase_orders.read core.purchase_orders.write core.invoices.read core.invoices.write core.requisitions.read core.requisitions.write core.suppliers.read core.suppliers.write

description.content:
The primary RESTful API for accessing and managing core Coupa Business Spend Management (BSM) resources including purchase orders, invoices, requisitions, and suppliers. Supports both JSON and XML response formats. All endpoints require OAuth 2.0 or API key authentication. Coupa recommends using query parameters to limit result sets for optimal performance.

Contact Support:
 Name: Coupa Support
